s: In 1997, Robinson Checo suited up for BOS as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.380, WHIP 1.130, SO 14, WAR 0.600.

Changed teams after the previous season (BOS -> LAD).
In 1999, Robinson Checo suited up for LAD as a two_way. Key numbers: AVG 0.333, OPS 0.667, HR 0, RBI 2, WAR -0.400. Notable context: Joined LAD.
